title: Political rally in Raxaul draws massive crowds ahead of voting day
snippet_text: Top party leaders addressed a massive rally in Raxaul promising job creations, free electricity, and specialized sub-plans for rural developmental bounds.

title: Welfare scheme execution becomes election issue in Raxaul
snippet_text: Local reports indicate that MGNREGA work allocations and PMAY home delivery rates are taking center stage in public debates across Raxaul assembly segment.

title: Voter turnout expected to touch record highs in Raxaul
snippet_text: Electoral awareness campaigns and intense political mobilization by party workers point to a high turnout of youth and women voters in Raxaul constituency.

title: High stakes battle in Raxaul as rival candidates file affidavits
snippet_text: The election filing process completed today in Raxaul. Multi-millionaire candidates and independent leaders enter the fray, making the contest highly unpredictable.
